message:
test(bd-3mme): add tool transform edge-case and accessor tests

Cover ArgTransform type helpers (default_int/bool, type_schema, hide,
drop_with_default, Debug, Clone), TransformedTool accessors
(parent_definition, arg_transforms, from_boxed), transform_arguments
edge cases (null→empty, non-object error, passthrough unknown args,
hidden without default error), ToolHandler delegation, builder
inheritance, schema description override, and NotSet sentinel
(5 → 26 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
